name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Create a `.env` file with...
2. Run `envguard check`
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full terminal output if possible.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.2]
- EnvGuard version: [e.g. 0.1.0] (run `envguard --version`)

## .env content (redact all values!)
```
KEY_NAME=
OTHER_KEY=
```

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or error tracebacks.
